title: Eva Historians Requesting Help
wikitext:
[]: Eva Historians - Requesting Help             Quote Post by d_animation » Fri Aug 23, 2019 1:02 pm Hello. I am a new member! This place is great I was looking at Gainax-published material for a specific sequence: the one pan shot of Rei in her sleeveless plugsuit that was added for Death and Rebirth. But the storyboard/sequence is weird. In the Groundworks of Evangelion The Movie 1, this cut is labeled as Cut 95 on the genga: https://i.imgur.com/QBLMnoU.jpg But that doesn't match what's in the Storyboards book for Death(True)2. The storyboard skips from Cut 93 to 107: https://i.imgur.com/eOVOhGl.jpg Then the appendix has these skipped cuts in the back - but Cut 95 is the beams falling down on Shinji. Which ended up being removed from Death(True)2 altogether. In fact all of these were removed: https://i.imgur.com/lbEGrrC.jpg The Cut 107 in the main section also wasn't in Death(True)2? Does anybody know what happened here, and why the D&R storyboard is missing this pan shot, and why that part of the storyboard is so off? Did they change things after the main storyboarding had been done? There is a prologue to the appendix, and I can't read Japanese - maybe this shines some light? https://i.imgur.com/T57wVS6.jpg Thank you!

[]: Re: Eva Historians - Requesting Help             Quote Post by d_animation » Fri Aug 23, 2019 1:07 pm [edit]

[]: Re: Eva Historians - Requesting Help             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 23, 2019 1:56 pm The cut of "heaving Rei" is properly labeled C-095 in the Death(True)^2 script included as a bonus on the Japanese DVD, for whatever that's worth.

[]: Re: Eva Historians - Requesting Help             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 23, 2019 2:02 pm There are three versions of Death . Although that Groundwork book was published in 2001 (according to my copy), it is possible, or even likely, that it contains material relating to the earlier, longer version.

[]: Re: Eva Historians - Requesting Help             Quote Post by d_animation » Fri Aug 23, 2019 5:56 pm Reichu wrote: The cut of "heaving Rei" is properly labeled C-095 in the Death(True)^2 script included as a bonus on the Japanese DVD, for whatever that's worth.

[]: Re: Eva Historians - Requesting Help             Quote Post by d_animation » Thu Oct 17, 2019 6:20 pm I'm gonna close the chapter on this book still wondering I guess I tried asking everywhere. Asked friends, asked some hardcore fans across the globe, heck I even tried emailing Gainax The forward of the storyboards appendex says something like "due to the nature of the storyboard, there is a situation where the content of the book is not consistent with the actual completion of the story" I wish I knew when and why the scene was added, and more specifically why it wasn't originally planned, but I am going to leave it at that
